AboutUs.Title: Welcome to Our School
AboutUs.Summary: With a proud legacy of 35+ years of excellence in education, our school has been committed to shaping young minds through quality learning, strong values, and holistic development.
Highlights: Over 35 years of trusted educational excellence
Quality education from Nursery to Class 5
Telugu Medium and English Medium instruction
Strong emphasis on academics, discipline, and moral values
Safe, caring, and child-friendly learning environment
Holistic development through co-curricular and extracurricular activities
A proud alumni network of 1,000+ successful students serving in various professions across the globe
